column1: # Malay (zlm) book names and abbreviations for biblelib
# Conventions: Alkitab dalam Bahasa Malaysia (ABM), Bible Society of Malaysia/Singapore
# Note: book names are largely identical to Indonesian Terjemahan Baru (ind) due to
#   shared post-1972 Ejaan Yang Disempurnakan spelling standard; native-speaker
#   review is recommended for any production use where Malay/Indonesian differences matter
# Abbreviations: consistent with ABM usage; no single published standard exists
# Deuterocanonical names from Malay Catholic editions; extended canon transliterated
